meta.title: Vedic Face Reading (Mukha Samudrika) Knowledge Base
sources: Saral Samudrik Shastra (Hindi) — classical Samudrika Shastra face/body reading
Face Reading - Amazing Secrets, Dharmender Kumar Bansal 'Patwari' — kundli-based face mapping
Brihat Samhita physiognomy tradition + Pancha Bhoota element mappings (research)
meta.disclaimer: Traditional Vedic self-reflection content. Not medical, psychological, hiring, or identity advice. Frame results as cultural insight, never as diagnosis or fact about a person.

modes.photo: Works for ANY face (self, friend, a photo). Uses face_shapes + three_zones + features + moles. No birth chart needed.
modes.kundli_linked: OPTIONAL toggle, only when reading your OWN face with a saved birth chart. Adds the kundli_layer (houses / face_nakshatras / planet appearance / combos) and the face-vs-chart cross-reference.

meta.scope_note: Deliberately EXCLUDES line-based reading (the source's 7 'forehead lines' / planetary rekha system and gait/walk reading). Those faint lines cannot be detected reliably from a single photo — the same accuracy problem as palm lines — so including them would add noise and hallucination. This base keeps only signals that are geometrically measurable (shapes, proportions) or discretely observable (moles, complexion), plus the chart-derived kundli layer.

square.geometric_signature: Face width ≈ jaw width ≈ forehead width; face height ≈ width (aspect ~1.0); strong angular jaw.
square.traits: Practical, grounded and reliable. Strong-willed, hardworking and persevering with good physical stamina. Values stability, security and tangible results; materially driven and dependable.
square.traits_female: Steady, dependable and capable; manages responsibilities with endurance.
square.shadow: Can be stubborn, rigid or overly materialistic when the earth element is excessive.

round.geometric_signature: Face fits within a circle; full/fleshy smooth cheeks; soft jawline; body tends stout.
round.traits: Imaginative, emotional and sensitive. Cheerful, friendly, generous and self-respecting. Prefers comfort and ease over hard toil; warm and people-oriented.
round.traits_female: Aesthetic, devoted, affectionate and generous; emotionally expressive, somewhat changeable in mood.
round.shadow: When water is excessive: avoids struggle, turns pessimistic, prone to low energy or ill health.

tapering.geometric_signature: Broad forehead narrowing toward a smaller chin (inverted-bucket / heart-ish); top-heavy.
tapering.traits: Healthy, courageous and intelligent. Far-sighted thinker, clear-spoken, proud and natural leader. Argumentative and persistent — does not back down in debate. Holds both constructive and forceful drives.
tapering.traits_female: Independent, assertive and talkative; thrives more in career/politics than in purely domestic roles.
tapering.shadow: When fire is excessive: quick to anger, domineering, can turn harsh or aggressive.

oval.geometric_signature: Broad forehead, gently curved cheeks, balanced length-to-width (egg-like); refined eyes.
oval.traits: Pure-natured, courageous and optimistic. Balanced, measured speaker; endlessly curious for knowledge; a seeker of peace, love and beauty who walks a progressive, self-restrained path.
oval.traits_female: Even-tempered and pleasant; with a little effort makes a harmonious, supportive partner.
oval.shadow: Narrow-egg forehead → less intellectual development, playful/willful; if lower face dominates → irritable, short-tempered, evasive.

inverted_pot.geometric_signature: Looks like an inverted pot on the neck — fuller upper/mid face tapering down; striking eyes.
inverted_pot.traits: Radiant presence with sharp, luminous eyes. Kind-hearted yet ambitious, self-respecting, idealistic and solitude-loving. Brilliant, spiritual and of unusual, original nature; rises to high positions and is drawn to socially beneficial work.
inverted_pot.traits_female: Dignified, principled and visionary; values independence and meaningful work.
inverted_pot.shadow: Excess ether can bring detachment, eccentricity or impractical idealism.

three_zones.note: Divide the face into three horizontal regions. The most developed (tall + broad) region shows the dominant dimension of the nature, and classically maps to a life phase.

upper_forehead.life_phase: Early life, ancestry, fortune (1st & 9th house themes).
upper_forehead.dominant_meaning: Strong intellect, reflection, ideals and good fortune; thinker more than doer.

mid_nose.governs: Physical vigour, practical drive and political/worldly ambition.
mid_nose.life_phase: Middle life, status, action (10th house themes).
mid_nose.dominant_meaning: Assertive, practical, ambitious and willful; pursues power and results.

lower_mouth.life_phase: Later life, relationships, appetites (7th house themes).
lower_mouth.dominant_meaning: Earthy, sensual, relationship-driven; strong appetites and survival instinct.

dominance_rules.then: Intelligent, gentle, thoughtful, practical, clever and successful.
Shrewd at reading situations but more self-interested; may accept unjust support to get ahead.

dominance_rules.if: nose region more developed than mouth
dominance_rules.then: Sensual, passionate and unrestrained; can be impulsive or forceful.
Quick, clear-spoken, willful, somewhat reserved, and a lover of justice.

broad_high.calc: forehead width/height large relative to face
broad_high.meaning: Intelligence, vision, leadership and good fortune (Jupiter-like).

narrow_low.meaning: Practical and present-focused; can be short-sighted or self-interested.

space_between_eyebrows.note: Bansal: the glabella (above the nose) reflects 4th-house themes — home, mother, inner contentment, property.

joined_unibrow.meaning: Strong, continuous focus; intense, sometimes obsessive drive.

curved_hairy.meaning: Bansal: Mercury-ascendant signature — youthful look, talkative.

eyes.note: Eyes also signal income (2nd) and expenses/losses (12th) in the kundli layer.

close_set.meaning: Focused, detail-oriented, strong-willed, can be stubborn.

cheeks.note: Bansal: cheeks reflect 10th-house (career, father) and, being 4th-from-7th, hint at the partner.

dimples.meaning: Charm; classically hints at the partner's playful nature.

ears.note: Often hidden in a front photo — mark not_assessable if not clearly visible. Reflect working capacity & earnings (3rd & 11th).

long_thick_lobes.meaning: Wisdom, longevity, security in later life; long-term planner.

nose.note: Bansal: the nose-head ties to 10th house and is 'shaped by Jupiter's position'; reflects ego vs humility.

space_nose_to_lips.note: Bansal: the philtrum links Punarvasu (Jupiter, nose) and Pushya (Saturn, lips) — read the interplay of these two planets here.

lips.note: Bansal: upper lip = manner of speaking; lower lip = partner, marriage, affairs (7th house).

small.meaning: Modest, understated; classically, a more timid or cautious temperament.

rough_thin_pale.meaning: Classically (Samudrik): a sign of hardship or discontent — read gently, never as a fixed fate.

chin_jaw.note: Bansal: chin is 'shaped by Mercury's position'.

broad_strong_jaw.calc: jaw width large relative to face

neckbones.note: Bansal: neck/collarbone region reflects 6th & 8th house themes (obstacles, health, transformation).

planets_appearance.note: Planet → facial signature, complexion and nature. Used both as Samudrik feature-archetypes (photo mode) and, in kundli mode, as the effect of a planet placed in the 1st house or as ascendant lord.

sun.features: large round face, honey-coloured eyes, dull-but-dignified features

moon.features: soft, innocent, sharp features; can look worried
moon.nature: gentle, emotional, changeable; low confidence if afflicted

mars.features: hard, strong features; scars, red moles or pimples

mercury.features: androgynous look (man softer, woman bolder), curved hairy eyebrows, youthful, average height

jupiter.features: intelligent, mature look; growth after youth; sometimes misshapen features
jupiter.effect: can enlarge/distort a feature; grandfather (M) / husband (F)

venus.features: attractive, plump, round (sometimes pimpled) face, pleasing eyes, sweet smile, curly hair

saturn.features: lean, bony, older-looking; deep-set eyes; fair & clear if well-placed

moles.note: Mole (til) reading: the VLM detects a mole's presence and approximate position from the image; meaning is looked up here. Colour hints at the causing planet (see colour_by_planet).

positions.meaning: Intelligent and progressive; rises through effort.

positions.location: left side of the central facial line
positions.meaning: Earns money through travel and journeys.
Intelligent; saves money through diligent effort.

positions.location: right side of the Mercury area
near the left eye / left eyebrow
positions.meaning: Solitary nature; tends toward an ordinary, self-contained life.

moles.principle: Auspicious placements (right side for men, hidden/upper positions) generally indicate gain; the planet's nature colours the specific theme.

kundli_layer.note: OPTIONAL — only when the user links their own birth chart (D-1 / Lagna kundali). Powers the 'does your face match your chart' cross-reference. Source: Bansal.

house_to_face_part.4: Space between eyebrows above the nose; paired with 10th
house_to_face_part.10: Cheeks & nose-head; paired with 4th — career & father
house_to_face_part.11: Left ear & shoulder; paired with 5th — earning capacity

ascendant_lord_appearance.sun: Large round face, honey-coloured eyes, light/wheatish hair and skin; dignified bearing.
ascendant_lord_appearance.moon: Soft, sober look; gentle and sensitive; can appear low in confidence.
ascendant_lord_appearance.mars: Fair complexion with a red tinge; scars/red moles or pimples; hard, intense look showing life's struggles.
ascendant_lord_appearance.mercury: Androgynous look, curved hairy eyebrows, appears younger than age, average height, talkative.
ascendant_lord_appearance.jupiter: Good growth after youth; intelligent, mature, respected; sometimes features look enlarged/misshapen.
ascendant_lord_appearance.venus: Average height, plump build, round (sometimes pimpled) attractive face, pleasing eyes, sweet smile, curly hair.
ascendant_lord_appearance.saturn: Looks older than age, thin and bony, pale or dark complexion, deep-set eyes; fair and clear-skinned if Saturn is well-placed.

planet_in_first_house_combos.look: Appears rich/wealthy though may actually lack money.
More or less facial hair than normal.
Mole or scar on the face.
Mole, freckle or birthmark on the face.
Charming, or with light/white spots on the face.
Tense look; mole on the face.
Mentally restless look; mole or freckle.
Scar or mole on the face.
